example_sentence: La equivalencia dinámica busca reproducir el efecto del original en el lector meta.
example_translation: Dynamic equivalence seeks to reproduce the original's effect on the target reader.

example_sentence: La palabra 'sensible' es un falso amigo — significa sensible, no sensato.
example_translation: The word 'sensible' is a false friend — it means sensitive, not sensible.

example_sentence: La localización va más allá de la traducción e incluye adaptación cultural.
example_translation: Localization goes beyond translation and includes cultural adaptation.

example_sentence: Llegó a casa de madrugada, cuando todos dormían.
example_translation: He arrived home in the small hours, when everyone was asleep.

translation: post-meal conversation / lingering at the table after eating
example_sentence: La sobremesa puede durar más que la comida misma en muchas familias mexicanas.
example_translation: The post-meal conversation can last longer than the meal itself in many Mexican families.

example_sentence: Tengo un antojo de tamales que no me puedo quitar.
example_translation: I have a craving for tamales that I can't shake.

example_sentence: No te andes por las ramas — dime directamente qué pasó.
example_translation: Don't beat around the bush — tell me directly what happened.

translation: to rain cats and dogs / to pour
example_sentence: Cancelamos el partido porque estaba lloviendo a cántaros.
example_translation: We cancelled the game because it was pouring.

example_sentence: Me di cuenta de que había cometido un error.
example_translation: I realized that I had made a mistake.

example_sentence: La reformulación es la clave de una buena interpretación consecutiva.
example_translation: Reformulation is the key to good consecutive interpretation.

example_sentence: La confianza entre ellos va mucho más allá de la simple amistad.
example_translation: The trust between them goes far beyond simple friendship.

translation: to burn one's bridges / to burn one's boats
example_sentence: Al renunciar sin aviso, quemó las naves con su ex empleador.
example_translation: By quitting without notice, he burned his bridges with his former employer.
